name: instagram-tools
description: A scalable collection of tools for Instagram users. Tool #1: Reel Transcriber.

scripts.gen: pnpm run gen:openapi && pnpm run gen:client
scripts.gen:check: pnpm run gen && git diff --exit-code -- apps/api/openapi.json packages/api-client/src/generated
scripts.check:web: pnpm --filter web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter web run lint
scripts.check:api: cd apps/api && .venv/bin/ruff check app/ tests/ && .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q
scripts.quick-check: pnpm run check:web && pnpm run check:api
